alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs, with experience guiding business stakeholders through strategic transformations and defining requirements
alignments.job_requirement: Partner with senior business stakeholders to understand pre-sales needs, guide AI strategy, and identify highest value use cases

alignments.candidate_evidence: Cross-functional program leadership experience at Google involving Sales, CS, Product, and Security teams; proven ability to synthesize feedback and drive organizational alignment
alignments.job_requirement: Work closely with Sales, Customer Success, Security, and Product teams; gather and relay customer feedback to inform product planning

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led compliance and security considerations in API rollouts and transformation programs; acted as trusted advisor on security themes with enterprise customers
alignments.job_requirement: Demonstrate thorough understanding of IT security principles and customer requirements for technical B2B SaaS products

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years leading global transformation initiatives with ownership across design, UAT, rollout, and scaling; actively learning Python and emerging technologies
alignments.job_requirement: Own problems end-to-end and willingly pick up knowledge needed to get the job done

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google managing technical and commercial relationships with enterprise partners; two promotions indicate progressive seniority and stakeholder management capability
alignments.job_requirement: 5+ years experience in technical pre-sales role managing C-level technical and business relationships with complex global organizations

gaps.gap: Pre-sales solutions engineering background; candidate's experience is primarily product operations, transformation, and business strategy rather than dedicated pre-sales role with customer-facing solution selling
gaps.mitigation: Strong cross-functional and customer stakeholder experience from transformation work translates to understanding customer needs and value articulation; can ramp pre-sales methodology and sales motion with onboarding, though first customer cycle will be a steeper learning curve

gaps.gap: Limited hands-on technical depth in Python, JavaScript, REST APIs, and cloud/network architecture; JD emphasizes demonstrating prototypes and guiding architecture
gaps.mitigation: Candidate is actively learning Python and has UAT and technical rollout experience; can work with technical partners on demos and leverage strong communication skills to translate architect recommendations; may need backend engineering collaboration on prototype depth

gaps.gap: No fluency in Spanish; role is based in Madrid and JD lists full professional fluency in both English and Spanish as a requirement
gaps.mitigation: German native and professional English fluency; would need to rapidly acquire Spanish language skills or accept working primarily through English with translators/local support—material friction for Madrid-based customer-facing role

gaps.gap: Generative AI and LLM product knowledge is not evidenced in profile; candidate's AI experience appears limited to transformation context
gaps.mitigation: Acute ramp time on ChatGPT, OpenAI API, and LLM fundamentals; strong learner profile and cross-functional skills suggest manageable but requires immediate focused preparation

gaps.gap: No dedicated customer success, account management, or quota-bearing sales background; role requires pre-sales acumen and customer intimacy skills that differ from operations-heavy transformation work
gaps.mitigation: Customer advisory and feedback synthesis experience from transformation programs provides partial foundation; would benefit from mentorship on customer sales psychology and pipeline management

output.summary: Candidate is a strategic operations and transformation leader with eight years at Google and proven cross-functional stakeholder management, but lacks dedicated pre-sales solutions engineering experience, hands-on technical depth in Python/APIs/cloud architecture, Spanish fluency (critical for Madrid-based role), and specific GenAI/LLM product knowledge. Strong on ownership, learning agility, and customer advocacy; high risk on pre-sales motion and immediate technical contribution.
uncertainties: Depth and recency of candidate's customer-facing pre-sales interactions and deal-cycle involvement at Google unclear from profile
Extent of hands-on architecture recommendation and prototyping in prior transformation work not specified
Willingness and ability to acquire Spanish fluency in a reasonable timeframe unknown; role is Madrid-based and JD lists bilingual as a requirement
Candidate's familiarity with REST APIs, cloud/network architecture, and modern SaaS infrastructure practices not detailed
Prior experience building or evaluating AI/ML solutions or understanding LLM deployment trade-offs not indicated
